01 — About

Who I am

I'm Dinesh Kumar Pilla, a passionate B.Tech student in Electronics and Communication Engineering at GMRIT, with a deep interest in Machine Learning, Data Science, and AI-powered applications.

My goal is to build a career as a Data Analyst / Data Scientist — exploring data, uncovering insights, and integrating AI to enhance efficiency. I enjoy working at the crossroads of engineering and data.

Beyond tech, I enjoy cooking, watching movies, listening to music, and gaming. I believe curiosity and continuous learning are the engines of growth.

📍 L-Kota, Vizianagaram, Andhra Pradesh — India

// 001
Offline Multimodal RAG Assistant

Built a fully offline Retrieval-Augmented Generation assistant capable of processing multiple data modalities. Combines local LLMs with vector search to answer queries over documents without any internet dependency.

06 — Publications

Research &
Publications

Peer-Reviewed · November 2025
Forecasting Future Vegetable Prices Using Data Science with Python
Pilla Dinesh Kumar
International Journal of Research Publication and Reviews (IJRPR) — Vol. 6, Issue 11, pp. 1905–1912, November 2025 · ISSN 2582-7421

This study develops a data-driven system for predicting future vegetable prices using Python and the Prophet time series forecasting model. Price data for commodities such as tomato, onion, and potato was collected from local agricultural markets, cleaned, and analyzed to identify seasonal patterns and trends. The model generates accurate two-year price forecasts, offering actionable insights to help farmers, traders, and consumers make informed market decisions.

Vegetable Price Forecasting Time Series Analysis Prophet Model Python Machine Learning Agriculture Market Data Science
📖 IJRPR
📅 November 2025
🏛️ GMR Institute of Technology
